ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE IS "DENIED", PER JUDGE PRO TEM BRADLEY KAPLAN. "THE REQUEST WAS NOT FILED AT LEAST 10 DAYS BEFORE HEARING. THE COURT PROVIDES CHILD CARE FREE OF CHARGE ON THE FIRST FLOOR OF THE COURTHOUSE. A REGISTRATION FORM IS ENCLOSED. ON WEDNESDAY, THE CHILD CARE OPENS AT 8:00AM". COPY MAILED TO PARTIES.
